## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential marketing collaboration between fwd.digital and getgc.ai, discussing current business states and future growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both companies experiencing rapid growth through founder-led sales in their respective niches (marketing for fwd.digital, legal AI for getgc.ai)](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Current focus for getgc.ai: Leverage founder's expertise/network; not yet ready for full-scale content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Recommendation: Cecilia to use AI tools to amplify personal brand/thought leadership; revisit broader marketing strategy when team expands](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)

## Topics

### Company Updates and Conference Experiences

  - [Marcel: Speaking at SaaStr, attending CMO brunch (200 CMOs)](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Cecilia: Speaking at AI conference, closing deals](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Both experiencing rapid growth in their respective startups](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)

### getgc.ai Current State

  - [500k ARR in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Team of 4-5 people, hiring to expand to 6](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Cecilia leading sales/marketing efforts personally](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Website: 5 pages, some blog posts, good press coverage](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Newsletter as primary content vehicle](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Building user community (e.g., user-created 15-page product guide)](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)

### fwd.digital Offerings and Approach

  - [AI-driven content creation workflows (e.g., base article, title generation, adaptation)](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Human-in-the-loop: Managing editors (international) + domain experts](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Cost-effective: \~$0.10/word vs. traditional $1-2/word](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Focus on "planting seeds" with high-volume, quality content (100k words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Adaptable for highly regulated industries (e.g., insurance)](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Marketing Strategy Recommendations for getgc.ai

  - [Continue founder-led growth and personal brand building](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [Utilize AI tools to amplify existing efforts (e.g., voice note to social media posts)](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [Consider workshops on "Applying AI to Legal" to generate interest](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
  - [Repurpose existing content (e.g., user-generated guides)](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Hold off on full-scale SEO/content marketing until team expands](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)

### Potential Future Collaboration

  - [Marcel to refer legal team contacts to Cecilia](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Cecilia to recommend Marcel for AI marketing inquiries](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [Revisit broader marketing engagement when getgc.ai team grows (e.g., after hiring "Cynthia-shaped person")](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send Cecilia AI prompts/workflows for personal brand amplification](https://fathom.video/share/7RKzxrugTXxnn3yrazxAyxdfxMuva33f?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
